data.name: Альтушка +
data.detailed_description:
Summer enrollment for the social program "Altushka +" starts.

NEW incredible, animated hentai clicker!

ARE YOU SCOOF?

  • No wife
  • No job
  • You're in your forties
  • You like to gamble

Then come to the convenient portal, leave an application and wait for your rightful altushka!

ARE YOU ALTUSHKA?

  • Wear dark clothes
  • Dye your hair bright colors.
  • Different
  • You like older men at home

Then go to the convenient portal, leave an application and wait for your rightful scoof!

Game Features:

  • The first portal for scoofs and altushks
  • Feel like an employee of scoofservices
  • Accept applications for future altushks
  • Conduct interviews
  • Test girls for sex tolerance.
  • Process scoof requests
  • Enjoy high quality animations and nice sound design

data.short_description: The summer recruitment of girls for the Altushka + social program starts. You have to take the role of an employee of the scoof services and select the girls who are ideal for the scoofs.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: This requirements are not final
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: This requirements are not final

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • Additional Notes: This requirements are not final
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i5-6500 / AMD Ryzen™ 5 1600 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 1660 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • Additional Notes: This requirements are not final
